detail.instructions: Define LogEntry<'a> with borrowed level: &'a str and message: &'a str fields.
detail.starterCode: // TODO: define LogEntry with borrowed fields.

files.content: // TODO: define LogEntry with borrowed fields.

hints.body: Borrowed struct fields need a lifetime parameter on the struct.
Both fields can borrow string slices from the original log line.
Use &'a str for each borrowed text field.

detail.completionExplanation: Borrowed fields let the entry view point into existing text. The lifetime parameter states that the entry cannot outlive the data it references.
